'''Crystal Reef''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[City/Legends|city]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].

==History==
Constructed in late [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Crystal Reef was designed as a resort [[City/Legends|city]] for the fabulously wealthy of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Plying the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of Dac's northern polar region, the city's viewing decks provided its passengers with views of impressive icebergs and icecaps as release from the resort's extensive [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] offerings. It was run by the [[Crystal Reef Amusement and Tourism Council]].

In [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]], [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] gangster [[Czethros]] established a base of operations in Crystal Reef with plans to use the resort as a sales point for his [[Spice/Legends|spice]] to its wealthy clientele. His efforts were disrupted by a group of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], including [[Anja Gallandro]], who helped remove Czethros and his agents and destroy his cache of spice hidden in the nearby polar caps.
